comment: silica MCP tool contract v0 — SPEC.md §2. Names and shapes are permanent.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Assert typed facts about an entity, creating it if needed. Unknown types or predicates are rejected against the SODL schema. Call at commit points only: a decision made, a preference stated, a correction, a task-end lesson.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Search memory. Returns provenance-carrying facts, hard-capped at max_tokens (default 800). Superseded facts are excluded unless as_of is set. Type filter includes subtypes. Call at session start (preferences + open decisions) and before decisions.

tools.name: invalidate
tools.description: Supersede a fact with a reason. Never deletes; writes a tombstone and links the chain. Call when the user corrects the agent or a decision changes.

tools.name: log_event
tools.description: Append to the activity log. Cheap; use for anything not worth a typed fact.
